meta_title: Mare Gastro | Lakeside Fine Dining Restaurant in Sapanca
meta_desc: A lakeside luxury fine dining restaurant in the garden of Didi Otel, on the shore of Lake Sapanca. Fresh seafood and Aegean, Mediterranean cuisine by Gourmand awarded Chef Doğan Anapa.
meta_desc_short: Lakeside luxury fine dining in Sapanca. Award winning chef, fresh seafood, Aegean and Mediterranean cuisine.
og_alt: Mare Gastro | Lakeside Fine Dining Restaurant in Sapanca
hero_sub: On the shore of the lake, at the heart of nature
story_lead: In that singular moment when the pines meet the water and the morning mist drifts gently across the lake, a dream took root in Didi Otel's garden, woven seamlessly into nature.
story_body1: From its light to its tables, from each plate to its very soul, every detail of Mare Gastro was envisioned, planned and brought to life with the utmost care by Kadir Çiçek, Chairman of the Board of Didi Otel.
story_body2: At the helm of the kitchen stands Executive Chef Doğan Anapa, who turns a background in cinema into flavour. He brings the purest ingredients of the Aegean and the Mediterranean to the plate as though telling a story.
story_sign_role: Didi Otel · Chairman of the Board
chef_q0: Cooking, much like making a film, is a way of telling a story.
chef_q1: The kitchen unites and shares; it is a space brimming with human stories.
chef_q2: Life is far too short to taste the same flavours forever.
chef_q3: Our plates reflect our state of mind.
chef_q4: I strive to present the local in a universal way.
chef_q5: The instinct to nourish people is a way of expressing love.
d_kozpatlican_d: Charred red pepper, green pepper, spring onion
d_humus_d: Smoked beef, cornichon pickles, hazelnut, extra virgin olive oil
d_pilav_d: Pine nuts, currants, spiced olive oil
d_levrekmarin_d: Citrus-cured, red onion, dill, extra virgin olive oil
d_semizotusalata_d: Strawberry, green apple, walnut, pomegranate vinaigrette
d_yunansalata_d: Tomato, cucumber, pepper, black olives, Ezine cheese
d_patatesterin_d: Chestnut mushroom sauce, smoked beef, mushroom salsa
d_gununbalik_d: Charred peppers, tomato, baby potatoes, beurre blanc
d_tekirtempura_d: House-made mayonnaise with herbs and capers
d_bonfile_d: 200 g beef, matchstick potatoes, black pepper sauce
d_ormanda_d: Chocolate mousse, profiteroles, vanilla ice cream
d_izgarakofte_d: French fries, spicy sauce or yoghurt
